strategy_description: HTB v18 (frozen final after 36 versions): 1h Donchian-20 breakout ≥0.4%, 4h EMA-20 sustained trend (above + rising 3 HTF bars), BTC not bearish, 08-18 UTC. Body ≥0.35, vol_ratio ≥1.2, ADX ≥25, RSI ≤78/≥22. Symmetric short. TP/SL = 3×/1.5× ATR clamped [1.5,8]/[0.7,3.5]%. 72h hold, 24h cooldown, 10 majors. Dev Pref 0.282 Gen 0.292 PnL +168%; Eval FAILED (Gen 0.126).
performance_description: FULL JOURNEY (36 versions across 10 strategy classes, 2 sessions). SESSION 1 (v1-v26) ended with v18 as dev-best (Pref 0.282 Gen 0.292 PnL +168.61% PF 1.66 MDD 27.3% WR 46.6% 219 trades, validate PASS 300/300, eval FAILED Gen 0.126). Details: v1-v6 15m strategies (squeeze/VWAP/taker-momentum/key-level) all lost to fee drag; v7 PIVOT to 1h+4h HTF gate unlocked first edge; v8-v18 tightened filters incl. 08-18 UTC time window; v19-v24 post-eval diagnostics (sweep-fade, BB reversal, RSI pullback, volume climax, bare Donchian) — no edge; v25 weekly calibration WORSE (lookback optima don't carry); v26 feature pruning — worse. SESSION 2 (v27-v36, all reverted): v27 Cross-Sectional Momentum (long top-2 / short bottom-2 by 48h return, rebalance 4h) → PnL -772% WR 36% 9712 trades. v28 flipped (long losers / short winners) → PnL -1250% WORSE. v29 v18 + Kaufman ER ≥ 0.30 over 24 bars → Pref 0.190 (vs v18 0.282); fixed stress but hurt bearish. ER 0.25/0.20 also worse. v30 DONCHIAN_MIN_MOVE 0.4→0.6% → Pref 0.047 catastrophic. v31 v18 without 08-18 UTC → Pref 0.172, 387 trades; time filter was load-bearing. v32 Minimalist (HTF+Donchian+ATR only) → Pref 0.036 MDD 59% 1586 trades; confirms v18 filter-chain is load-bearing. v33-v35 Funding-Rate Extremes Fade (ContextKey::Funding, z_30d thresholds): v33 two-sided +3.4% Pref 0.001; v34 long-only -0.72%; v35 short-only +4.12% Pref 0.001. z 1.5 → -64%, z 2.5 → +1.3%, 48h hold → -47%. No meaningful edge. v36 BREAKTHROUGH on dev: v18 + funding "not-crowded" filter (skip LONG if z_30d ≥ +1.5, skip SHORT if z_30d ≤ -1.5) → DEV Pref 0.327 Gen 0.306 (FIRST TIME above 0.3!) PnL 154.7% PF 1.70 MDD 22.4% Sortino 7.01 198 trades. BUT EVAL FAILED HARDER than v18: PnL -28.55% Gen 0.082 MDD 70.5% PF 0.87 WR 28.5% — funding filter overfit dev regime. Critical learning: dev-side improvements above 0.3 Gen DO NOT guarantee eval success. The dev→eval gap was 0.306→0.082 = 0.224 for v36 vs 0.292→0.126 = 0.166 for v18; v36 actually widened the gap while improving dev. v36 shows that the "lift dev Gen above 0.3" optimization criterion is itself susceptible to feature overfit. CONCLUSION: v18 remains the strongest robust strategy. 36-version exhaustive search across 10 strategy classes + 2 information channels (BTC structure, funding) on 10-major universe + 2 timeframes (15m, 1h) + multiple TP/SL geometries has converged to a dev-overfit local optimum that does not generalize. Further progress requires either: a DIFFERENT universe (more symbols or different asset class), DIFFERENT data (orderbook, on-chain, options OI), or DIFFERENT evaluation (longer windows to dampen regime variance). NEXT SESSION ideas in order of expected novelty: (a) 20-30 symbol universe with per-symbol vol-adaptive thresholds; (b) multi-timeframe signal stacking (require 15m + 1h + 4h all aligned, fewer but higher-conviction signals); (c) pair trades within universe (BTC-ETH ratio, basket-vs-BTC) using standardized spread deviations; (d) sub_strategy calibration per program.md for regime-dependent pattern dispatch; (e) trailing stops / chandelier exit if runtime supports.
